lines.gurmukhi: ਡਿਠਾ ਸਭੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: dditthaa sabh sansaar sukh na naam bin |
lines.english: I have seen the whole world - without the Lord's Name, there is no peace at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੀ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਾਇ ਕਿਨਿ ਬਿਧਿ ਧੀਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: doojee naahee jaae kin bidh dheereeai |
lines.english: There is no other place; how else can we be comforted?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਨ ਪਦੁ ਨਿਰਬਾਣੁ ਇਕੋ ਸਿਮਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jeevan pad nirabaan iko simareeai |
lines.english: To obtain the state of life of Nirvaanaa, meditate in remembrance on the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਹੋਸੀ ਛਾਰੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਕੋਇ ਜਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: tan dhan hosee chhaar jaanai koe jan |
lines.english: Body and wealth shall return to dust - hardly anyone realizes this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਭੁਲਾਏ ਆਪਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਕਲ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਣੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: jis bhulaae aap tis kal nahee jaaneea |
lines.english: One whom the Lord Himself misleads, does not understand His awesome power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗ ਰੂਪ ਰਸ ਬਾਦਿ ਕਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਪਰਾਣੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: rang roop ras baad ki kareh paraaneea |
lines.english: Pleasure, beauty and delicious tastes are useless; what are you doing, O mortal?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣਿ ਦੁਆਰਿ ਜੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak saran duaar je tudh bhaavahee |2|
lines.english: Nanak: those who are pleasing to Your Will, O Lord, seek Sanctuary at Your Door. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤੇ ਨਿਰਬਾਣੁ ਸਚਾ ਗਾਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: rang rate nirabaan sachaa gaavahee |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the Love of the Lord attain Nirvaanaa, singing the Praises of the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਮਣੁ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਤਿਨੑ ਕਉ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਲੜਿ ਲਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: jaman maran na tina kau jo har larr laage |
lines.english: Those who are attached to the hem of the Lord's robe, do not suffer birth and death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਤ ਸੇ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਹੋਏ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨਿ ਜਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: jeevat se paravaan hoe har keeratan jaage |
lines.english: Those who remain awake to the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises - their lives are approved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਵਿਸਰਿਐ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਜੀਵਣਾ ਤੂਟੇ ਕਚ ਧਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: naae visariai dhrig jeevanaa tootte kach dhaage |
lines.english: But those who forget the Name - their lives are cursed, and broken like thin strands of thread.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗੁ ਜਿਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਸੇਈ ਵਡਭਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasang jin paaeaa seee vaddabhaage |
lines.english: Those who attain the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, are very fortunate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਣਿ ਸੁਵੰਨੀ ਖੜ ਰਤਨ ਜੜਾਵੀ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਮਨਿ ਵੁਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: dharan suvanee kharr ratan jarraavee har prem purakh man vutthaa |
lines.english: Like the beautiful earth, adorned with jewels of grass - such is the mind, within which the Love of the Lord abides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਧੂੜਿ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਸਾਧ ਲਖ ਕੋਟਿ ਪਿਰਾਗੇ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: naanak dhoorr puneet saadh lakh kott piraage |16|
lines.english: O Nanak, the dust of the feet of the Holy is more sacred than hundreds of thousands, even millions of cleansing baths at sacred shrines. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਦੀ ਫਿਰਦੀ ਦਹ ਦਿਸਾ ਜਲ ਪਰਬਤ ਬਨਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: firadee firadee deh disaa jal parabat banaraae |
lines.english: Roaming and wandering in the ten directions, over water, mountains and forests

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਕਾਜ ਸੁਹੇਲੜੇ ਥੀਏ ਗੁਰੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਤੁਠਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabhe kaaj suhelarre thee gur naanak satigur tutthaa |1|
lines.english: All one's affairs are easily resolved, O Nanak, when the Guru, the True Guru, is pleased. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਡਿਠਾ ਮਿਰਤਕੋ ਇਲ ਬਹਿਠੀ ਆਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jithai dditthaa miratako il bahitthee aae |2|
lines.english: - wherever the vulture sees a dead body, he flies down and lands. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੇੜੈ ਦੇਖਉ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਇਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: nerrai dekhau paarabraham ik naam dhiaavau |
lines.english: Behold the Supreme Lord God near you, and meditate on the Naam, the Name of the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਸਗਲ ਕੀ ਰੇਣੁਕਾ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਮਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: hoe sagal kee renukaa har sang samaavau |
lines.english: Become the dust of all men's feet, and so merge with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖਾ ਫਲ ਲੋੜੀਅਹਿ ਸੋ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: jis sarab sukhaa fal lorreeeh so sach kamaavau |
lines.english: One who longs for all comforts and rewards should practice Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਣਾਵਉ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: patit puneet karataa purakh naanak sunaavau |17|
lines.english: Nanak speaks of the Purifier of sinners, the Creator, the Primal Being. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਦੇਈ ਕਿਸੈ ਜੀਅ ਪਤਿ ਸਿਉ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: dookh na deee kisai jeea pat siau ghar jaavau |
lines.english: Do not cause any being to suffer, and you shall go to your true home with honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਦੋਹਾ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok dohaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Dohaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਜਿ ਸਾਜਨੁ ਮੈ ਕੀਆ ਸਰਬ ਕਲਾ ਸਮਰਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: ek ji saajan mai keea sarab kalaa samarath |
lines.english: I have made the One Lord my Friend; He is All-powerful to do everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕਰੁ ਗਹਹਿ ਪਿਆਰੜੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਨ ਛੋਡਾ ਮੂਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: je kar gaheh piaararre tudh na chhoddaa mool |
lines.english: Take my hand, O my Beloved; I shall never forsake You.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਹਮਾਰਾ ਖੰਨੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਮਨ ਤਨ ਸੰਦੜੀ ਵਥੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jeeo hamaaraa khaneeai har man tan sandarree vath |1|
lines.english: My soul is a sacrifice to Him; the Lord is the treasure of my mind and body. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਘਰਿ ਜਿਸ ਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh nidhaan ghar jis dai har kare su hovai |
lines.english: All treasures are in His Home; whatever the Lord does, comes to pass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਛੋਡਨਿ ਸੇ ਦੁਰਜਨਾ ਪੜਹਿ ਦੋਜਕ ਕੈ ਸੂਲਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har chhoddan se durajanaa parreh dojak kai sool |2|
lines.english: Those who forsake the Lord, are the most evil people; they shall fall into the horrible pit of hell. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਜੀਵਹਿ ਸੰਤ ਜਨ ਪਾਪਾ ਮਲੁ ਧੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jap jap jeeveh sant jan paapaa mal dhovai |
lines.english: The Saints live by chanting and meditating on the Lord, washing off the filth of their sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਵਸਹਿ ਸੰਕਟ ਸਭਿ ਖੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal hiradai vaseh sankatt sabh khovai |
lines.english: With the Lotus Feet of the Lord dwelling within the heart, all misfortune is taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦਰਸ ਪਿਆਸ ਨਾਨਕ ਘਣੀ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਵੈ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: prabh daras piaas naanak ghanee kirapaa kar devai |18|
lines.english: Nanak is thirsty for the Blessed Vision of God's Darshan; by His Grace, He has bestowed it. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਭੇਟੀਐ ਮਰਿ ਜਨਮਿ ਨ ਰੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa jis bhetteeai mar janam na rovai |
lines.english: One who meets the Perfect Guru, shall not have to suffer through birth and death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੋਰੀ ਭਰਮੁ ਵਞਾਇ ਪਿਰੀ ਮੁਹਬਤਿ ਹਿਕੁ ਤੂ ॥
lines.translit: bhoree bharam vayaae piree muhabat hik too |
lines.english: If you can dispel your doubts, even for an instant, and love your only Beloved,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਡਖਣਾ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok ddakhanaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Dakhanaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥਹੁ ਵੰਞੈ ਜਾਇ ਤਿਥਾਊ ਮਉਜੂਦੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jithahu vanyai jaae tithaaoo maujood soe |1|
lines.english: then wherever you go, there you shall find Him. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੰਸਾ ਸੇਤੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਉਲਾਸਹਿ ਕੁਕੜ ਦੀ ਓਡਾਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: hansaa setee chit ulaaseh kukarr dee oddaaree |2|
lines.english: Can they be swans, and fulfill their conscious desires, if they can only fly like chickens? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੜਿ ਕੈ ਘੋੜੜੈ ਕੁੰਦੇ ਪਕੜਹਿ ਖੂੰਡੀ ਦੀ ਖੇਡਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: charr kai ghorrarrai kunde pakarreh khoonddee dee kheddaaree |
lines.english: Can they mount horses and handle guns, if all they know is the game of polo?

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਉਚਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਸ੍ਰਵਣੀ ਸੁਣੈ ਸੋ ਉਧਰੈ ਮਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: rasanaa ucharai har sravanee sunai so udharai mitaa |
lines.english: Those who chant the Lord's Name with their tongues and hear it with their ears are saved, O my friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਲਿਖਹਿ ਲਾਇ ਭਾਵਨੀ ਸੇ ਹਸਤ ਪਵਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: har jas likheh laae bhaavanee se hasat pavitaa |
lines.english: Those hands which lovingly write the Praises of the Lord are pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਮਜਨਾ ਸਭਿ ਪੁੰਨ ਤਿਨਿ ਕਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: atthasatth teerath majanaa sabh pun tin kitaa |
lines.english: It is like performing all sorts of virtuous deeds, and bathing at the sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਸਾਰ ਸਾਗਰ ਤੇ ਉਧਰੇ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਗੜੁ ਜਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: sansaar saagar te udhare bikhiaa garr jitaa |
lines.english: They cross over the world-ocean, and conquer the fortress of corruption.
